# XCTKeyPathExpectation.SynchronousFilter | Apple Developer Documentation

-  XCTKeyPathExpectation.SynchronousFilter 

Type Alias# XCTKeyPathExpectation.SynchronousFilter

iOS 13.0+iPadOS 13.0+Mac Catalyst 13.0+tvOS 13.0+

```
typealias SynchronousFilter = @Sendable (T, NSKeyValueObservedChange<V>) -> Bool
```

Available when `T` inherits `NSObject`.## [See Also](/documentation/xctest/xctkeypathexpectation/synchronousfilter#see-also)

### [Creating key path expectations](/documentation/xctest/xctkeypathexpectation/synchronousfilter#Creating-key-path-expectations)

[`convenience init(keyPath: KeyPath<T, V>, observedObject: T, options: NSKeyValueObservingOptions, expectedValue: V)`](/documentation/xctest/xctkeypathexpectation/init(keypath:observedobject:options:expectedvalue:))Creates an expectation that the system fulfills when the value of the observed property changes to an expected value.[`convenience init(keyPath: KeyPath<T, V>, observedObject: T, options: NSKeyValueObservingOptions, predicate: XCTKeyPathExpectation<T, V>.Predicate?)`](/documentation/xctest/xctkeypathexpectation/init(keypath:observedobject:options:predicate:))Creates an expectation that the system fulfills when the value of the observed property changes and satisfies the conditions of a predicate’s evaluation.Deprecated[`convenience init(keyPath: KeyPath<T, V>, observedObject: T, options: NSKeyValueObservingOptions, filter: XCTKeyPathExpectation<T, V>.SynchronousFilter?)`](/documentation/xctest/xctkeypathexpectation/init(keypath:observedobject:options:filter:)-plka)[`convenience init(keyPath: KeyPath<T, V>, observedObject: T, options: NSKeyValueObservingOptions, filter: XCTKeyPathExpectation<T, V>.AsynchronousFilter?)`](/documentation/xctest/xctkeypathexpectation/init(keypath:observedobject:options:filter:)-8noag)[`typealias AsynchronousFilter`](/documentation/xctest/xctkeypathexpectation/asynchronousfilter)[`typealias Predicate`](/documentation/xctest/xctkeypathexpectation/predicate)A function the key path expectation uses to test the value of an observed property.Deprecated
